# playwright-scenarios

> A small Ktor + Kotlin HTML DSL "Bookshelf" demo site used as a target for Playwright scenario recording, review, and test generation skills.

The app mixes static marketing pages, dynamic HTML-rendered views, a session-backed cart, hardcoded login, form validation with field-level errors, and a native HTML5 drag-and-drop "My Shelves" page. All state (carts, shelves, orders) lives in memory only and resets on JVM restart.

## Docs

### README

---

A Ktor-based "Bookshelf" demo site used as a target for the `/record-scenario`, `/review-scenario`, and `scenario-to-tests` skills in this marketplace.

**Requirements:** JDK 21+. Run with `./gradlew run` (server listens on `http://localhost:8080`). State lives only in memory and resets on restart. Test with `./gradlew test`.

**Demo accounts:** `demo/demo`, `alice/wonderland`, `bob/password1`.

**Pages:**

| Path | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `/` | Static home (hero + featured books) |
| `/about` | Static about page |
| `/catalog` | Search, genre filter, sort, paginated (6/page) |
| `/books/{id}` | Detail page ŌĆö Add to Cart / Add to Shelf |
| `/cart` | Line items, qty updates, remove |
| `/checkout` | Multi-field form with server-side validation |
| `/login` | Hardcoded credentials, `?next=` support |
| `/shelves` | Three shelves with native HTML5 drag-and-drop between and within columns |
| `/orders` | Past orders for the logged-in user |

**Project structure:** `src/main/kotlin/com/mattbobambrose/` with `routing/` (per-feature route wiring), `html/` (Kotlin HTML DSL pages + shared Layout), `model/`, `data/` (hardcoded Catalog + Users, in-memory Stores), and `session/` (cookie-based `UserSession` / `GuestSession`). Gradle version catalog at `gradle/libs.versions.toml`.

**Drag-and-drop:** Native HTML5 DnD with a tiny inline script that POSTs JSON to `/shelves/move` or `/shelves/reorder`. Playwright's `locator.dragTo()` works directly.

---

### CLAUDE.md

---

**Architecture**
- Ktor + Kotlin HTML DSL; all feature areas split per file under `routing/` and `html/`
- In-memory state only (`data/Stores.kt`); tests use `runTestApp { }` which calls `Stores.resetAll()` first
- Session storage via Ktor `Sessions` plugin; `UserSession` (logged-in) + `GuestSession` (anonymous cart)
- JDK 21 toolchain pinned in `build.gradle.kts`; dependencies managed via `gradle/libs.versions.toml`

**Non-obvious gotchas**
- Ktor `Sessions` data classes MUST be `@Serializable` (kotlinx.serialization) ŌĆö failures surface as `Serializer for class 'X' is not found` at request time, not compile time
- Use `respondSeeOther(url)` (303) for POSTŌåÆGET redirects, not `respondRedirect` (302). 303 interacts cleanly with Ktor client test redirect following and the PRG pattern
- In Kotlin HTML DSL, `input { id = "x" }` and `select { id = "x" }` don't compile ŌĆö use `attributes["id"] = "x"` instead
- `respondPage(title, status, content)` accepts a custom status ŌĆö pass `HttpStatusCode.BadRequest` when re-rendering a form with validation errors, otherwise `respondHtml` defaults to 200 and overrides any `call.response.status(...)` set before it

**Testing**
- Kotest StringSpec with `init { }` per the global rule
- Use `runTestApp { client -> ... }` from `src/test/kotlin/TestSupport.kt`
- Test client has `HttpCookies` but no auto-redirect plugin ŌĆö follow redirects explicitly via `client.followRedirectAsGet(response)` (POST 303 to a GET endpoint would otherwise re-POST and 405)
- `./gradlew test` for the suite; `./gradlew build` runs tests too

---

## API

### Application.module ŌĆö `src/main/kotlin/Application.kt`

`fun Application.module()` ŌĆö installs ContentNegotiation (JSON), Sessions, Monitoring (call logging), and all seven feature route modules.

---

### Routing

- `fun Application.configureStaticRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /` and `GET /about`
- `fun Application.configureCatalogRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /catalog` (params: `q`, `genre`, `sort`, `page`) and `GET /books/{id}`
- `fun Application.configureCartRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /cart`, `POST /cart/add`, `POST /cart/{id}/qty`, `POST /cart/{id}/remove`
- `fun Application.configureCheckoutRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /checkout`, `POST /checkout` (validates, renders errors with 400 on failure), `GET /checkout/confirmation/{orderId}`
- `fun Application.configureAuthRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /login`, `POST /login` (with `?next=`), `POST /logout`
- `fun Application.configureShelfRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /shelves` (login-gated), `POST /shelves/add`, `POST /shelves/move` (JSON `{bookId, fromShelf, toShelf, beforeBookId?}`), `POST /shelves/reorder` (JSON `{shelf, bookId, beforeBookId?}`)
- `fun Application.configureOrderRouting()` ŌĆö `GET /orders` (login-gated)
- `suspend fun ApplicationCall.respondSeeOther(location: String)` ŌĆö 303 See Other redirect helper

---

### Pages (HTML DSL)

- `suspend fun ApplicationCall.respondPage(title: String, status: HttpStatusCode = OK, content: BODY.() -> Unit)` ŌĆö shared layout with Tailwind CDN head, nav (with dynamic cart count + login state), and footer
- `suspend fun ApplicationCall.renderHome()` / `renderAbout()` / `renderCatalog(CatalogQuery)` / `renderBookDetail(Book, showShelfPicker, flashMessage)` / `renderCart(items)` / `renderCheckout(items, form, errors)` / `renderCheckoutConfirmation(orderId, items, totalCents)` / `renderLogin(next, username, error)` / `renderShelves(shelvesData)` / `renderOrderHistory(orders)`

---

### Data

- `object Catalog` ŌĆö `books: List<Book>` (20 hardcoded), `findById(Int)`, `findByIds(List<Int>)`
- `object Users` ŌĆö `users: Map<String, User>`, `authenticate(username, password): User?`
- `object Stores` ŌĆö `cartFor(key): Cart`, `shelvesFor(username): Shelves`, `ordersFor(username): List<Order>`, `addOrder(Order)`, `findOrder(id)`, `nextOrderId(): String`, `resetAll()`

---

### Model

- `data class Book(id, title, author, genre, priceCents, rating, coverEmoji, blurb)` with `enum class Genre`
- `class Cart` ŌĆö thread-safe; `snapshot()`, `add(bookId, qty)`, `setQty(bookId, qty)`, `remove(bookId)`, `clear()`, `itemCount`
- `data class Order(id, username, items, totalCents, shippingName, shippingAddress, placedAt)`
- `enum class Shelf { WANT, READING, FINISHED }`; `class Shelves` ŌĆö `booksOn(shelf)`, `addIfAbsent(bookId, shelf)`, `move(bookId, from, to, beforeBookId?)`, `reorder(shelf, bookId, beforeBookId?)`
- `data class User(username, displayName, password)`

---

### Session

- `@Serializable data class UserSession(username: String)`
- `@Serializable data class GuestSession(id: String)`
- `fun Application.configureSessions()` ŌĆö installs both cookies (path `/`, httpOnly)
- `fun ApplicationCall.cartKey(): String` ŌĆö returns `user:<username>` if logged in, otherwise ensures a `GuestSession` and returns `guest:<uuid>`

---

### Tests

- `src/test/kotlin/TestSupport.kt` ŌĆö `runTestApp { client -> ... }`, `testClient()`, `followRedirectAsGet(response)`, `postFormFollow(url, ...)`, `loginAs(username, password)`
- Suites: `ApplicationTest`, `CatalogTest`, `AuthTest`, `CartTest`, `CheckoutTest`, `ShelfTest` ŌĆö all Kotest `StringSpec` with `init { }`
